description: Read-only Roslyn-powered code analysis for C#/VB.NET solutions: semantic find-references/implementations, call hierarchy, diagnostics, NuGet/BCL decompilation, impact analysis and dead-code detection for AI coding agents.
name: io.github.andrewiethoff/MCPRoslyn
